events.name: New York Giants at Carolina Panthers

headlines.description: — Eddy Pineiro kicked a 36-yard field goal in overtime and the Carolina Panthers made it back-to-back wins for the first time this season, beating the New York Giants 20-17 in Germany on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pineiro's 36-yard field goal in OT lifts Panthers to 20-17 win over Giants in Germany

events.name: New England Patriots at Chicago Bears

headlines.description: — The New England Patriots had Caleb Williams on the run and his receivers locked down right from the start.
headlines.shortLinkText: Drake Maye gets the better of Caleb Williams as sack-happy Patriots beat Bears 19-3

headlines.description: — Josh Allen expects more out of Buffalo’s offense than he saw Sunday at Indianapolis.
headlines.shortLinkText: Allen runs for TD and Bills force 4 turnovers by Flacco to win 5th straight, 30-20 over Colts

events.name: Denver Broncos at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — The Chiefs have won just about every way imaginable during a perfect 15-game run that dates to last season: Patrick Mahomes leading last-second touchdown drives, their defense making a stand, and Harrison Butker kicking game-winning field goals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chiefs block Broncos' potential winner as time expires, hold on for 16-14 win to remain perfect

events.name: Atlanta Falcons at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — Before interim New Orleans Saints coach Darren Rizzi disappeared down a tunnel toward the locker room, he paused, holding his gold, team-issued hat high above his head, and acknowledged fans still celebrating his triumphant debut in the Superdome.
headlines.shortLinkText: Nobody beats the Rizz: Saints top Falcons 20-17 to snap 7-game skid in coach Darren Rizzi's debut

events.name: San Francisco 49ers at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: — Jake Moody said his confidence never wavered. Not even after a frustrated teammate confronted him on the sideline.
headlines.shortLinkText: Moody shrugs off 3 missed FGs to kick 49ers past Buccaneers 23-20 in McCaffrey's season debut

headlines.description: — Anyone who questioned Pittsburgh Steelers coach Mike Tomlin's switch to Russell Wilson from Justin Fields might be reconsidering the...
headlines.shortLinkText: Russell Wilson's TD pass to Mike Williams lifts the Steelers over the Commanders 28-27

headlines.description: — The only remotely close part of this matchup was the final score.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stingy Vikings hold the clawless Jaguars to 143 yards in a 12-7 victory and improve to 7-2

events.name: Tennessee Titans at Los Angeles Chargers

headlines.description: — The combination of steady play by Justin Herbert and a strong defense has given the Los Angeles Chargers their best start in six years.
headlines.shortLinkText: Justin Herbert has TDs passing and rushing as Chargers beat Titans 27-17 for 3rd straight win

headlines.description: — Jalen Hurts had just lost a fumble that could have put Philadelphia behind in the first half against Dallas.
headlines.shortLinkText: Hurts accounts for 4 TDs as Eagles roll past bumbling, Prescott-less Cowboys 34-6

events.name: New York Jets at Arizona Cardinals

headlines.description: — Kyler Murray surveyed the field for a moment before getting absolutely clobbered by Jets linebacker Quincy Williams, who hit Murray so hard from the blind side that the...
headlines.shortLinkText: Brilliant performance by Kyler Murray leads Cardinals over Jets 31-6 for 4th straight victory

headlines.description: — Nothing was going right for Detroit's Jared Goff on Sunday night against the Houston Texans.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jake Bates makes 52-yarder as time expires, Lions overcome Jared Goff's 5 INTs to beat Texans 26-23
